headline: Kraft Heinz Stays Intact As Berkshire Backing Shapes Turnaround Prospects
summary: Kraft Heinz has dropped earlier plans to split the business, keeping its operations under a single structure. Berkshire Hathaway, a major shareholder, has decided to keep its stake after previously indicating a willingness to sell. The combination of a unified company and continued backing from a key investor marks a new phase in Kraft Heinz's turnaround efforts. Kraft Heinz, ticker NasdaqGS:KHC, enters this shift with its shares trading at $22.47. The stock has seen a 2.2% return over the...
